keyInfo.title: Venue websites
keyInfo.text:
Grand Wailea, Maui, Hawaii - [https://www.grandwailea.com](https://www.grandwailea.com)

Marriott (Wailea Beach Resort) - [https://www.marriott.com/en-us/hotels/hnmmc-wailea-beach-resort-marriott-maui/overview/](https://www.marriott.com/en-us/hotels/hnmmc-wailea-beach-resort-marriott-maui/overview/)

keyInfo.title: Crew catering location
keyInfo.text: "The Cave" at Grand Wailea. Crew will need a pass and be checked off a list.

keyInfo.title: Entertainment
keyInfo.text:
**Welcome Reception (Wet and Dry)** * Kanekoa * Manutea * (4) Hula Dancers - will need their tracks played (sent in separate email) * (2) Fire + Knife Drummers - floor mics **Circle Late Lounge** * DJ Kara
**Kick Off breakfast** * DJ Kara **Kick Off** * Manutea - needed in Gardens + Ballroom * Vocalist/Guitarist - 1 vocal mic with stand, soundboard for him to plug his guitar into, wedge monitor if available * Drummers - 2 floor mics (can determine if needed in ballroom but Jaydee recommended due to audience size) * Manutea - needed in Ballroom only * Cultural Practitioner - either lav mic or headset mic with pack **Theme** * DJ Kara * Maggie Speaks **Gala Grand Wailea** * Corbin Glover * Maggie Speaks **Circle Club** * DJ Kara **Gala Marriott** * Mana Music String Trio * Liquid Blue * DJ Sarah Haywood (post Gala Marriott Circle Club)
